sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.section_role: Sets the commercial and technical stakes of the Vera Rubin NVL72 system and pitches the proprietary BoM and Power Budget Model.
translation_notes: Maintain the assertive, commercial urgency of the sales pitch in the final paragraph.
Ensure trademarked names (Vera, Rubin, NVLink, ConnectX-9, Spectrum-6) are kept in English or use established bilingual conventions.

sections.title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.next_section_title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.section_role: Details the core silicon and networking innovations that form the foundation of the Rubin platform's massive scale-out capabilities.
translation_notes: Highly technical networking terms require precise industry-standard Chinese equivalents: 'radix' (端口基数/基数), 'SerDes' (串行解串器), 'CPO' (光电共封装).
Ensure 'optical engines' is translated as 光引擎.

sections.title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.previous_section_title: Extreme Co-design: 6 Silicon Product Offerings under the Rubin Platform - Chip Floorplans & Specifications
sections.section_role: Explains the macro architectural shift to the NVL72 rack scale form factor and the underlying memory economics driving this change.
translation_notes: Translate 'memory economics' as 存储经济学 or 内存经济学.
Carefully translate 'premium compresses' (溢价收窄/溢价压缩) to accurately reflect the financial argument regarding DDR vs HBM pricing.

sections.title: Compute Tray Redesign
sections.previous_section_title: Rubin Oberon Rack: NVL72 not NVL144 nor NVL36
sections.section_role: Introduces the most significant mechanical and architectural change in the system: the cableless, modular compute tray.
translation_notes: Translate 'compute tray' consistently as 计算托盘.
Ensure 'KV cache' remains KV Cache or KV缓存.
Preserve the stark contrast in Jensen's assembly time claim (2 hours to 5 minutes) without softening the metric.

sections.title: Compute Tray Cableless Design
sections.section_role: Explains the electrical, signal integrity, and material engineering challenges overcome to enable the cableless tray.
translation_notes: Translate 'insertion loss' as 插入损耗 and 'geometry loss' as 几何损耗.
The metaphor 'bumps in a highway' should be translated fluidly (e.g., 就像高速公路上的减速带) to maintain the explanatory tone.
Ensure 'CCL' is translated as 覆铜板 (Copper Clad Laminate).

sections.title: Compute Tray: Thermal
sections.section_role: Details the 100% liquid cooling architecture required by the dense, fanless compute tray and the resulting changes to assembly processes.
translation_notes: Clearly distinguish 'L6 assembly' (L6级组装) and 'L10 assembly' (L10级组装).
Translate 'micro-channel cold plate (MCCP)' as 微通道冷板.
Translate 'quick disconnects' as 快速接头 or 盲插快速接头 depending on exact context.

sections.title: Compute Tray: Power Delivery
sections.section_role: Explains the power routing, voltage step-downs, and efficiency improvements within the compute tray.
translation_notes: Ensure the physics concept 'quadratic relationship' is translated accurately as 二次方关系 or 平方关系.
Translate 'busbar clips' as 母排夹 or 汇流排夹.
Translate 'power distribution module (PDB)' as 配电模块.

sections.title: Compute Tray: Mechanical
sections.section_role: Describes the physical chassis, guiding mechanisms, and locking structures that physically enable the modular, cableless design.
translation_notes: Translate 'MQD' (Manifold Quick Disconnect) as 分水器快速接头 or 盲插快速接头.
Translate 'loading mechanism' as 加载机构, 压紧机构, or 锁紧机构.
Keep mechanical descriptions highly visual and precise to aid technical comprehension.

sections.title: Rack Level Infrastructure: Thermal
sections.section_role: Analyzes the macro-level cooling implications of the new architecture and its disruptive impact on the broader data center cooling ecosystem.
translation_notes: Translate 'Mr. Market' as 市场先生 (a standard finance personification).
Translate 'mechanical compressor-based chillers' as 基于机械压缩机的冷水机组.
Preserve the contrarian, analytical tone regarding market expectations and ecosystem disruption.

sections.title: Assembly Automation and Logistics
